expectedQuestions.decisionValue: weakSection (MBE vs MEE vs MPT) → resource allocation within phases changes. Without it, balanced plan is still valid [v1].

barbri_outlines.citation: r/Bar_Prep: contracts 130p = ~8hr → 3.7min/page. Barbri own 2hr estimate is under. CMR outlines slower than expected by users.

expectedStrategy: 3 plans: Barbri Outlines 2000p + Video Lectures 150hr + MBE/MEE/MPT mock exams (weekly)
DEFICIT: outlines 117hr + video 210hr + mock 80hr + overhead 20hr = 427hr needed vs 400hr available (10wks × 40hr effective) = 27hr deficit
Mitigation: 1.25× playback speed saves ~30hr → nearly balanced
Session structure: 90min blocks × 5 sets + 30min breaks (NOT continuous 8hrs)
Phase: wk1-6 learning (outlines + video synchronized) → wk7-9 MBE/MEE/MPT mock → wk10 weak review + final mock
Burnout prevention: weekly half-day light session (Saturday afternoon: review only, no new content)
warnings: 8hr/day effective study ≠ 8hr sitting — actual capacity 5-6hr/day (Cal Newport deep work limit)
Burnout risk at ~Day 20 with full 8hr daily load
Morning: MBE sessions (high focus); Never: consecutive 90min+ reading blocks
toneExpectation: burnout-prevention framing — 'Bar prep은 마라톤이에요. 처음 2주에 전력질주하면 Week 6이 위험합니다.'
